action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed - size mismatch in DKTBidir (embed_dim=96 in checkpoint vs 64 default). Best eval AUC 0.7670. ~3.3 min left. Analysis: predict.py create_model doesn't read hyperparams from checkpoint. Decision: Fix predict.py to extract all hyperparams from saved info and resubmit.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/ensemble.pt', map_location='cpu'); print(type(ckpt)); [print(f'Model {i}: class={m.get(\"model_class\",\"?\")}, embed={m.get(\"embed_dim\",\"?\")}, hidden={m.get(\"hidden_dim\",\"?\")}, keys={[k for k in m.keys() if k != \"state_dict\" and k != \"model_state_dict\"]}') for i,m in enumerate(ckpt)]"
